trends.name: AI Corridor Expansion
trends.description: Toronto-Montreal AI corridor attracting $4.8B in venture investment, creating demand for AI talent and consulting services across financial services and healthcare.

trends.name: Green Energy Transition
trends.description: Canada's Net-Zero by 2050 commitment driving $120B in clean energy infrastructure, hydrogen hubs, and carbon capture projects across Alberta and BC.

trends.name: Digital Government Modernization
trends.description: Federal and provincial governments accelerating cloud migration and digital services, with $8.2B allocated for IT modernization through 2027.

trends.name: Open Banking Framework
trends.description: Canada's phased open banking rollout creates advisory and implementation opportunities across all Big Five banks and fintech ecosystem.

trends.name: Critical Minerals Strategy
trends.description: Government investing $3.8B in critical mineral supply chains (lithium, cobalt, nickel) to position Canada as global EV supply chain leader.

risks.title: Housing Affordability Crisis
risks.description: Persistent housing costs affecting talent attraction in Toronto and Vancouver. Could impact Accenture's ability to recruit and retain in key markets.

risks.title: US-Canada Trade Tensions
risks.description: Potential tariff escalation on critical sectors. Cross-border supply chain disruptions could impact manufacturing and energy clients.

risks.title: Tech Sector Correction
risks.description: Ongoing rationalization in Canadian tech sector. May reduce near-term IT spending, but creates consulting opportunity for cost optimization.

risks.title: Interest Rate Uncertainty
risks.description: BoC rate path unclear — further cuts could stimulate investment, but persistent inflation could pause easing.

opportunities.title: AI/ML Advisory & Implementation
opportunities.description: Canada's AI ecosystem creates a unique position for Accenture to lead enterprise AI transformation across financial services and healthcare.

opportunities.title: Federal Cloud Migration
opportunities.description: Government of Canada's cloud-first policy and $4.2B IT modernization budget. Major opportunity in SAP, ServiceNow, and cloud infrastructure.

opportunities.title: Energy Transition Consulting
opportunities.description: Alberta energy companies pivoting to clean tech. Carbon capture, hydrogen, and renewable energy consulting.

opportunities.title: Open Banking Implementation
opportunities.description: All Big Five banks plus 20+ fintechs need API infrastructure, compliance frameworks, and customer experience redesign.
